title: LDT-proof backfill for the 2026-05-17 session's ~25 Concepts that lack companion Swift Testing witnesses — substrate-doctrine debt per Curry-Howard mission
description:
Per AGENTS.md Curry-Howard mission: 'AStupid: an AI that looks right at the prose layer and crashes at the proof layer. Plausible, hallucinated, undischarged.' This session authored ~25 Concepts (typed prose) and only 2 LDT proofs:
- 2026-05-17-substrate-imdb-character-worldline-shapes.swift (green; CharacterModel + WorldlineModel invariants)
- 2026-05-17-xor-ternary-optional-substrate-algebra.swift (green; 4-state encoding + Kleene XOR + ABSENT propagation)

The other ~23 Concepts ship as typed prose without compiled proof witnesses. Per substrate's own discipline, each substantive structural claim must become a compilable Swift proof under repl-proofs/.

CONCEPTS LACKING LDT PROOFS (substrate-doctrine debt):
- mass-cultural-surface-for-substantive-core — claim: 3-ingredient pattern (mass-cultural surface + substantive core + cutting-edge tech) appears in 4 historical instances. Proof: type the 4 instances; assert each has all 3 ingredients; assert ingredient-absence at any one would have prevented zeitgeist penetration.
- axis-rotation-across-cognitive-vector-space — claim: substrate doctrines are rotations not inversions. Proof: model rotation as matrix op; assert binary inversion is a 180° rotation; assert other rotations exist.
- imaginary-axis-continuation-makes-disjoint-functions-continuous — claim: imaginary-axis extension makes discontinuous real-line functions continuous. Proof: type log(z) for x<0 vs in complex plane; assert continuity in complex plane.
- computer-graphics-as-substrate-higher-d-rendering — claim: Apple's simd primitives compose with substrate types. Proof: use simd_quatf to interpolate two Concept-position quaternions.
- scientific-method-as-substrate-test-bench — claim: HypothesisModel's required fC IS Popper's demarcation criterion. Proof: assert HypothesisModel can't be constructed without fC.
- scientific-method-lessons-for-substrate — 9 lessons each could be a sub-proof.
- substrate-is-test-harness-engineering-for-cognitive-content — claim: substrate is pre-AI in concept. Proof: type the pre-1990s primitives substrate uses (Popper 1934, Curry combinator 1940s, scientific method).
- substrate-externalizes-google-test-harness-database-moat — claim: Google's productivity = infrastructure × organizational Hilbert space. Proof: type the multiplicative decomposition.
- substrate-quantizes-googles-hilbert-space-of-organizational-concepts — claim: substrate persona ladder maps to Google's L3-L9. Proof: type the correspondence.
- three-valued-logic-for-open-extensible-catalogs — claim: LinkRef-typed catalogs need TRUE/FALSE/UNKNOWN handling. Proof: already exists as part of xor-ternary-optional proof; could break out as standalone.
- vc-engagement-as-strategic-adversarial-game-cisco-warning — claim: Cisco-founder pattern is the canonical takeover sequence. Proof: type the sequence as a state machine; assert reachability of founder-ouster from term-sheet acceptance.
- substrate-y-combinator-fixed-point-reached (recognized but not formally typed as its own Concept yet — depends on whether the formal recognition deserves its own Concept beyond the recognition embedded in substrate-multi-timeline-rendering).
- arm-fluff-for-substrate-content / engage-politics-via-typed-rendering / bastards-for-peace-and-love / dick-pick-pop-culture-semantic-bridge / pop-culture-hilbert-space-composition / substrate-imdb-of-people-characters-personas-across-hilbert-timelines — each is a doctrine-grade Concept; each needs at least a minimal LDT proof asserting its core typed claim.

Closure: each Concept ships with its companion .swift proof file under ~/.claude/memory/.docc/repl-proofs/. The substrate's Curry-Howard mission becomes empirically grounded, not just doctrinally asserted. Estimated 20-30 small proof files. Each runs green via `swift <file>`. Per substrate's commit-like-tweets cadence: one proof per commit; ~20-30 commits.

This is a substantial closure pass. Recommend running it incrementally across the next 5-10 sessions, not in a single batch.
